scenario: Full Operational Day: 44 children, 10 staff (2 absent), 2 incidents, licensing visit, tax meeting, new hire training, AI lesson building

results.name: Attendance count
results.detail: 44 unique children, 51 check-in/out records

results.name: Currently present query
results.detail: 0 children currently checked in (all have check_out in test data since full day simulated)

results.name: Staff schedule query
results.detail: 8 staff scheduled today

results.name: Absent staff detection
results.detail: 2 absent: Tyler Nguyen, Keisha Brown

results.name: Meal count tracking
results.detail: 18 meal records across rooms. Totals: {"breakfast":47,"am_snack":49,"lunch":56,"pm_snack":53}

results.name: Real-time ratio calculation
results.detail: ARCHITECTURE GAP: attendance table has no classroom_id column. Cannot calculate per-room ratios from attendance data. Must cross-reference family_children.classroom field.

results.name: Incident retrieval
results.detail: 2 incidents found. Types: behavioral (minor), child_injury (moderate)

results.name: Parent notification tracking
results.detail: Incident has actions_taken noting parent was called, but no structured parent_notified_at field in incident_reports table. The localStorage incident-log-storage.ts has this field but DB schema does not.

results.name: Follow-up tracking
results.detail: 2 incidents need follow-up. Follow-up notes captured.

results.name: Understaffed room detection
results.detail: School-age room has 0 scheduled staff (Keisha absent). System correctly shows the gap.

results.name: Behavioral pattern detection
results.detail: INTELLIGENCE GAP: Incident notes mention "second biting incident this month" but there is no automated pattern detection. System cannot query historical incidents for the same child to surface patterns.

results.name: Ratio display on demand
results.detail: Ratios page exists at /admin/ratios but calculates from localStorage, not Supabase attendance. A licensor asking "show me your ratios right now" would see localStorage data, not real kiosk check-ins.

results.name: Training records on file
results.detail: 20 training records in DB. Covers CPR, annual hours, onboarding.

results.name: CPR/First Aid gaps
results.detail: GAP DETECTED: 1 staff without CPR: Priya Sharma. This is surfaceable from DB.

results.name: Expiring cert detection
results.detail: 1 certs expiring within 30 days: Jasmine Taylor - Food Handler Certificate (2026-05-10)

results.name: Incident log accessible
results.detail: 2 incidents retrievable with full detail, witnesses, actions taken.

results.name: CACFP compliance status
results.detail: April compliance: score 80/100. Missing special diet documentation for 1 child. Monthly claim not yet submitted.

results.name: CACFP meal documentation
results.detail: 18 meal records for 2026-04-10. All 4 meal types across 5 rooms. On-time submission tracked.

results.name: Emergency contacts on file
results.detail: 0 of 10 employees have emergency contacts. Fields exist in schema but none populated.

results.name: Monthly revenue data
results.detail: 6 months of financial data (Q1 actual + Q2 projected)

results.name: Q1 P&L summary
results.detail: Q1 Revenue: $143,800 | Expenses: $123,100 | Net: $20,700 (14.4% margin)

results.name: Revenue breakdown by source
results.detail: Tuition: $277,500 | CACFP: $22,200 | 7.4% from CACFP

results.name: Payroll as % of expenses
results.detail: Labor: $177,000 (70.3% of total expenses)

results.name: Enrollment count for projections
results.detail: 3 currently enrolled from pipeline + 44 children in attendance = revenue base

results.name: Export to accountant
results.detail: Financial page at /admin/financial exists with charts and data display. ExcelJS export is available on the budget page. But no dedicated "export for accountant" format (CSV with tax categories, payroll breakdowns by employee).

results.name: Pipeline visibility
results.detail: Pipeline: {"new":2,"touring":3,"contacted":2,"enrolled":3}

results.name: Tour scheduling
results.detail: 3 tours scheduled. Next: James Foster on 2026-04-11

results.name: Pipeline conversion metrics
results.detail: Pipeline has 10 entries across 4 stages. Can calculate conversion rates. But no automated funnel visualization or time-in-stage tracking.

results.name: Capacity vs enrollment
results.detail: Licensed capacity: 77 across 5 rooms. Current attendance: 44. Utilization: 57%

results.name: Intelligence scan capability
results.detail: Intelligence page at /admin/intelligence runs training-scan and staffing-scan. Can detect stuck learners, cert clusters, pipeline staleness, CACFP gaps.

results.name: Decision learning (second brain)
results.detail: LearnedPreferences component exists and tracks approve/deny patterns from recommendations. But requires 3+ decisions before patterns emerge. No day-level learning yet.

results.name: Daily report API
results.detail: API at /api/reports/daily exists but returns zeros (scaffold only). Real data is client-side in localStorage. Cannot generate an authoritative daily report from the database.

results.name: Day reconstruction from data
results.detail: All individual data points exist in DB (attendance, meals, incidents, schedules). But no single query or view stitches a day together into a narrative. A "today at a glance" requires 6+ separate queries.

results.name: Cross-day pattern detection
results.detail: No mechanism to compare today to past days. Cannot detect: "Last time you were 2 staff short on a Friday, lunch ratio dropped below compliance for 45 minutes." Incident pattern detection for repeat behaviors also missing.

results.name: Next-day preparation
results.detail: Smart dashboard has time-zone alerts (opening/core/closing) but only for current-day data in localStorage. No "tomorrow prep" view that checks: staff schedule, expected attendance, supply needs, pending follow-ups.
